card_mod.style:
ha-card { background: rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(245,166,35,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

ha-card { background: rgba(157,110,240,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(157,110,240,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(157,110,240,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

ha-card { background: rgba(240,64,96,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(240,64,96,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(240,64,96,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

ha-card { background: rgba(16,208,144,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(16,208,144,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(16,208,144,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

ha-card { background: rgba(77,142,240,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(77,142,240,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(77,142,240,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

ha-card { background: rgba(157,110,240,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(157,110,240,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(157,110,240,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

card.border-left: [[[ return entity.state === 'locked' ? '3px solid #00d4f0' : entity.state === 'unlocked' ? '3px solid #f5a623' : '3px solid #f04060' ]]]

card_mod.style: ha-card { border-left: 3px solid [[[ return entity.state === 'locked' ? '#00d4ff' : entity.state === 'unlocked' ? '#f5a623' : '#f04060' ]]]; border-radius: 14px; }

card.border-left: [[[ return entity.state === 'locked' ? '3px solid #00d4f0' : entity.state === 'unlocked' ? '3px solid #f5a623' : '3px solid #f04060' ]]]

card_mod.style: ha-card { border-left: 3px solid [[[ return entity.state === 'locked' ? '#00d4ff' : entity.state === 'unlocked' ? '#f5a623' : '#f04060' ]]]; border-radius: 14px; }

card.border-left: [[[ return entity.state === 'locked' ? '3px solid #00d4f0' : entity.state === 'unlocked' ? '3px solid #f5a623' : '3px solid #f04060' ]]]

card_mod.style: ha-card { border-left: 3px solid [[[ return entity.state === 'locked' ? '#00d4ff' : entity.state === 'unlocked' ? '#f5a623' : '#f04060' ]]]; border-radius: 14px; }
ha-card { border-left: 3px solid [[[ return entity.state === 'closed' ? '#10d090' : entity.state === 'open' ? '#f04060' : '#f5a623' ]]]; border-radius: 12px; }
ha-card { border-left: 3px solid [[[ return entity.state === 'closed' ? '#10d090' : entity.state === 'open' ? '#f04060' : '#f5a623' ]]]; border-radius: 12px; }

chips.content: {% set alarm = states('alarm_control_panel.kuprycz_home') %}{% set alarmLabel = {'disarmed':'Disarmed','armed_away':'Armed Away','armed_home':'Armed Home','arming':'Arming','pending':'Pending','triggered':'TRIGGERED'}[alarm] | default('Unknown') %}{{ 'Alarm: ' + alarmLabel }}

{% set f=is_state('lock.front_door_lock','locked') %}{% set b=is_state('lock.back_door_lock','locked') %}{% set g=is_state('lock.gemelli_door_lock','locked') %}{% set lg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746c3_door','closed') %}{% set rg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746b4_door','closed') %}{% if f and b and g and lg and rg %}All Secure{% elif not (f and b and g) %}Check Locks{% elif not (lg and rg) %}Garage Open{% else %}Check{% endif %}
chips.icon_color: {% set f=is_state('lock.front_door_lock','locked') %}{% set b=is_state('lock.back_door_lock','locked') %}{% set g=is_state('lock.gemelli_door_lock','locked') %}{% set lg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746c3_door','closed') %}{% set rg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746b4_door','closed') %}{% if f and b and g and lg and rg %}#10d090{% else %}#f04060{% endif %}

chips.content: {% set on_lights = states.light | selectattr('state','eq','on') | list | count %}{{ on_lights }} Lights On
chips.icon_color: {% set on_lights = states.light | selectattr('state','eq','on') | list | count %}{% if on_lights > 0 %}#00d4f0{% else %}#4a5570{% endif %}

chips.content: {% set t = state_attr('climate.daikin','current_temperature') %}{% if t != None %}{{ t | round(0) | int }}°F{% else %}--°F{% endif %}

card_mod.style: ha-card { background: #0b0e17; border: none; border-left: 3px solid #00d4f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 20px; box-shadow: none; }

cards.label:
[[[ const e = entity || {}; const state = e.state || 'unavailable'; const isPlaying = state === 'playing'; const isPaused = state === 'paused'; const attrs = e.attributes || {}; const track = attrs.media_title || (isPlaying || isPaused ? 'Unknown Track' : (state === 'idle' ? 'Nothing Playing' : 'Unavailable')); const artist = attrs.media_artist || ''; const stateLabel = {playing:'Playing',paused:'Paused',idle:'Idle',unavailable:'Unavailable',off:'Off'}[state] || state; const stateColorRgb = isPlaying ? '77,142,240' : isPaused ? '245,166,35' : '74,85,112'; const volPct = attrs.volume_level != null ? Math.round(attrs.volume_level * 100) : 0; const dur = attrs.media_duration || 0; const pos = attrs.media_position || 0; const updAt = attrs.media_position_updated_at; const elapsed = (isPlaying && updAt) ? pos + (Date.now() - new Date(updAt).getTime()) / 1000 : pos; const pct = dur > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.round(elapsed / dur * 100)) : 0; const fmt = s => { const m = Math.floor(s/60); return m + ':' + String(Math.floor(s%60)).padStart(2,'0'); }; const playIconSvg = isPlaying ? '' : ''; const artUrl = attrs.entity_picture || null; const artHtml = artUrl ? '' : '
'; return '
' + '
Now Playing
' + '
' + artHtml + '
' + '
' + track + '
' + (artist ? '
' + artist + '
' : '') + '
Benjamin\'s Room
' + '
' + '
' + playIconSvg + '
' + '
' + (dur > 0 ? '
' + fmt(elapsed) + '' + fmt(dur) + '
' : '') + '
'; ]]]

service_data.code: (function(){ var h = document.querySelector('ha-top-app-bar-fixed, app-header, .header'); var r = h ? h.getBoundingClientRect() : null; var sc = document.querySelector('hui-root') || document.querySelector('.content'); var pt = sc ? getComputedStyle(sc).paddingTop : 'n/a'; var msg = (r ? 'header top:' + Math.round(r.top) + ' bottom:' + Math.round(r.bottom) + ' height:' + Math.round(r.height) : 'header: NOT FOUND') + ' | paddingTop:' + pt + ' | innerH:' + window.innerHeight; var ha = document.querySelector('home-assistant'); if(ha && ha.hass){ ha.hass.callService('persistent_notification','create',{title:'Header Diag',notification_id:'diag_live',message:msg}); } })()

cards.label:
[[[ const d = new Date(); const hh = d.getHours() % 12 || 12; const mm = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0'); const ampm = d.getHours() >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'; const time = hh + ':' + mm + ' ' + ampm; const days = ['Sunday','Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday']; const months = ['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December']; const dateStr = days[d.getDay()] + ' \u00b7 ' + months[d.getMonth()] + ' ' + d.getDate(); const alarmState = (states['alarm_control_panel.kuprycz_home'] || {}).state || 'unknown'; const alarmBg = {disarmed:'rgba(16,208,144,0.12)',armed_away:'rgba(77,142,240,0.10)',armed_home:'rgba(245,166,35,0.10)',arming:'rgba(245,166,35,0.10)',pending:'rgba(245,166,35,0.10)',triggered:'rgba(240,64,96,0.15)'}[alarmState] || 'rgba(100,116,139,0.15)'; const alarmColor = {disarmed:'#10d090',armed_away:'#4d8ef0',armed_home:'#f5a623',arming:'#f5a623',pending:'#f5a623',triggered:'#f04060'}[alarmState] || '#94a3b8'; const alarmLabel = {disarmed:'Disarmed',armed_away:'Armed Away',armed_home:'Armed Home',arming:'Arming',pending:'Pending',triggered:'TRIGGERED'}[alarmState] || 'Unknown'; const wx = states['weather.forecast_home'] || {}; const temp = wx.attributes && wx.attributes.temperature != null ? Math.round(wx.attributes.temperature) + '\u00b0' : '--\u00b0'; const cond = wx.state || ''; const condStr = {sunny:'Sunny','clear-night':'Clear',partlycloudy:'Partly Cloudy',cloudy:'Cloudy',fog:'Foggy',rainy:'Rainy',pouring:'Heavy Rain',snowy:'Snowy','snowy-rainy':'Sleet',hail:'Hail',lightning:'Lightning','lightning-rainy':'Storms',windy:'Windy','windy-variant':'Windy',exceptional:'Unusual'}[cond] || cond || '--'; const weatherIcon = {sunny:'\u2600\ufe0f','clear-night':'\ud83c\udf19',partlycloudy:'\u26c5',cloudy:'\u2601\ufe0f',fog:'\ud83c\udf2b\ufe0f',rainy:'\ud83c\udf27\ufe0f',pouring:'\u26c8\ufe0f',snowy:'\u2744\ufe0f','snowy-rainy':'\ud83c\udf28\ufe0f',hail:'\ud83c\udf28\ufe0f',lightning:'\u26a1','lightning-rainy':'\u26c8\ufe0f',windy:'\ud83c\udf2c\ufe0f','windy-variant':'\ud83c\udf2c\ufe0f',exceptional:'\ud83c\udf21\ufe0f'}[cond] || '\ud83c\udfe1'; function avatar(entity, initials) { const home = (states[entity] || {}).state === 'home'; return '
' + initials + '
'; } return '
' + '
' + '' + time + '' + '' + dateStr + '' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '' + alarmLabel + '
' + '
' + '
' + '' + weatherIcon + '' + '' + temp + '' + '' + condStr + '' + '
' + '
' + avatar('person.chris', 'C') + avatar('person.claire', 'CL') + avatar('person.benjamin', 'B') + '
' + '
'; ]]]

[[[ const e = entity; const currentTemp = e.attributes.current_temperature != null ? Math.round(e.attributes.current_temperature) : '--'; const setpoint = e.attributes.temperature != null ? Math.round(e.attributes.temperature) : '--'; const hvacMode = e.state || 'off'; const modeColor = {cool:'#4d8ef0',heat:'#f5a623',heat_cool:'#10d090',auto:'#10d090',off:'#4a5570',fan_only:'#00d4f0',dry:'#f5a623'}[hvacMode] || '#8a9ab8'; const modeBg = {cool:'rgba(77,142,240,0.08)',heat:'rgba(245,166,35,0.08)',heat_cool:'rgba(16,208,144,0.08)',auto:'rgba(16,208,144,0.08)',off:'rgba(74,85,112,0.08)',fan_only:'rgba(0,212,240,0.08)',dry:'rgba(245,166,35,0.08)'}[hvacMode] || 'rgba(138,154,184,0.08)'; const modeBorder = {cool:'rgba(77,142,240,0.35)',heat:'rgba(245,166,35,0.35)',heat_cool:'rgba(16,208,144,0.35)',auto:'rgba(16,208,144,0.35)',off:'rgba(74,85,112,0.20)',fan_only:'rgba(0,212,240,0.35)',dry:'rgba(245,166,35,0.35)'}[hvacMode] || 'rgba(138,154,184,0.20)'; const modeLabel = {cool:'Cool',heat:'Heat',heat_cool:'Auto',auto:'Auto',off:'Off',fan_only:'Fan',dry:'Dry'}[hvacMode] || hvacMode; const progressColor = hvacMode === 'cool' ? 'linear-gradient(to right,#4d8ef0,#00d4f0)' : 'linear-gradient(to right,#f0a030,#f06040)'; const minT = e.attributes.min_temp || 60; const maxT = e.attributes.max_temp || 90; const pct = setpoint !== '--' ? 'PM' : 'AM'; const time = hh + ':' + mm + ' ' + ampm; const days = ['Sunday','Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday']; const months = ['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December']; const dateStr = days[d.getDay()] + ' \u00b7 ' + months[d.getMonth()] + ' ' + d.getDate(); const alarmState = (states['alarm_control_panel.kuprycz_home'] || {}).state || 'unknown'; const alarmBg = {disarmed:'rgba(16,208,144,0.12)',armed_away:'rgba(77,142,240,0.10)',armed_home:'rgba(245,166,35,0.10)',arming:'rgba(245,166,35,0.10)',pending:'rgba(245,166,35,0.10)',triggered:'rgba(240,64,96,0.15)'}[alarmState] || 'rgba(100,116,139,0.15)'; const alarmColor = {disarmed:'#10d090',armed_away:'#4d8ef0',armed_home:'#f5a623',arming:'#f5a623',pending:'#f5a623',triggered:'#f04060'}[alarmState] || '#94a3b8'; const alarmLabel = {disarmed:'Disarmed',armed_away:'Armed Away',armed_home:'Armed Home',arming:'Arming',pending:'Pending',triggered:'TRIGGERED'}[alarmState] || 'Unknown'; const wx = states['weather.forecast_home'] || {}; const temp = wx.attributes && wx.attributes.temperature != null ? Math.round(wx.attributes.temperature) + '\u00b0' : '--\u00b0'; const cond = wx.state || ''; const condStr = {sunny:'Sunny','clear-night':'Clear',partlycloudy:'Partly Cloudy',cloudy:'Cloudy',fog:'Foggy',rainy:'Rainy',pouring:'Heavy Rain',snowy:'Snowy','snowy-rainy':'Sleet',hail:'Hail',lightning:'Lightning','lightning-rainy':'Storms',windy:'Windy','windy-variant':'Windy',exceptional:'Unusual'}[cond] || cond || '--'; const weatherIcon = {sunny:'\u2600\ufe0f','clear-night':'\ud83c\udf19',partlycloudy:'\u26c5',cloudy:'\u2601\ufe0f',fog:'\ud83c\udf2b\ufe0f',rainy:'\ud83c\udf27\ufe0f',pouring:'\u26c8\ufe0f',snowy:'\u2744\ufe0f','snowy-rainy':'\ud83c\udf28\ufe0f',hail:'\ud83c\udf28\ufe0f',lightning:'\u26a1','lightning-rainy':'\u26c8\ufe0f',windy:'\ud83c\udf2c\ufe0f','windy-variant':'\ud83c\udf2c\ufe0f',exceptional:'\ud83c\udf21\ufe0f'}[cond] || '\ud83c\udfe1'; function avatar(entity, initials) { const home = (states[entity] || {}).state === 'home'; return '
' + initials + '
'; } return '
' + '
' + '' + time + '' + '' + dateStr + '' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '' + alarmLabel + '
' + '
' + '
' + '' + weatherIcon + '' + '' + temp + '' + '' + condStr + '' + '
' + '
' + avatar('person.chris', 'C') + avatar('person.claire', 'CL') + avatar('person.benjamin', 'B') + '

card_mod.style:
ha-card { height: 30vh; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
ha-card::before { content: '● LIVE'; position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; z-index: 50; background: rgba(240,64,96,0.85); color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 4px; pointer-events: none; }

ha-card { height: 30vh; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
ha-card::before { content: '● LIVE'; position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; z-index: 50; background: rgba(240,64,96,0.85); color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 4px; pointer-events: none; }

ha-card { height: 30vh; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
ha-card::before { content: '● LIVE'; position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; z-index: 50; background: rgba(240,64,96,0.85); color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 4px; pointer-events: none; }

card.label:
[[[ const e = entity || {}; const state = e.state || 'unavailable'; const isPlaying = state === 'playing'; const isPaused = state === 'paused'; const attrs = e.attributes || {}; const track = attrs.media_title || (isPlaying || isPaused ? 'Unknown Track' : (state === 'idle' ? 'Nothing Playing' : 'Unavailable')); const artist = attrs.media_artist || ''; const stateLabel = {playing:'Playing',paused:'Paused',idle:'Idle',unavailable:'Unavailable',off:'Off'}[state] || state; const stateColorRgb = isPlaying ? '77,142,240' : isPaused ? '245,166,35' : '74,85,112'; const volPct = attrs.volume_level != null ? Math.round(attrs.volume_level * 100) : 0; const dur = attrs.media_duration || 0; const pos = attrs.media_position || 0; const updAt = attrs.media_position_updated_at; const elapsed = (isPlaying && updAt) ? pos + (Date.now() - new Date(updAt).getTime()) / 1000 : pos; const pct = dur > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.round(elapsed / dur * 100)) : 0; const fmt = s => { const m = Math.floor(s/60); return m + ':' + String(Math.floor(s%60)).padStart(2,'0'); }; const playIconSvg = isPlaying ? '' : ''; const artUrl = attrs.entity_picture || null; const artHtml = artUrl ? '' : '
'; return '
' + '
' + '
' + '' + '
' + '
' + playIconSvg + '
' + '
' + '' + '
' + '
' + '
' + artHtml + '
' + '
' + track + '
' + (artist ? '
' + artist + '
' : '') + '
Benjamin\'s Room
' + '
' + '' + stateLabel + '' + '
' + (dur > 0 ? '
' + fmt(elapsed) + '' + fmt(dur) + '
' : '') + (volPct > 0 ? '
' + volPct + '%
' : '') + '
'; ]]]

[[[ return '
Nothing Playing
Benjamin's Room
'; ]]]

[[[ return '
Nothing Playing
Benjamin's Room
'; ]]]
